recommendations.title: The Monsters
recommendations.overview: The myths of the sixties are satirized in 20 episodes.

recommendations.title: The Treasure of San Gennaro
recommendations.overview: A pair of Americans want to perform the greatest robbery: the treasure of San Gennaro, in Napoli.

recommendations.title: Scandal in Sorrento
recommendations.overview: Back to his hometown, a former marshal finds his house occupied by a young woman working as a fishwife.

recommendations.title: Scent of a Woman
recommendations.overview: An army cadet accompanies an irascible, blind captain on a week-long trip from Turin to Naples.

recommendations.title: Il Sorpasso
recommendations.overview: Roberto, a shy law student in Rome, meets Bruno, a forty-year-old exuberant, capricious man, who takes him for a drive through the Roman and Tuscany countries in the summer. When their journey starts to blend into their daily lives though, the pair’s

recommendations.title: A Difficult Life
recommendations.overview: Silvio refuses to fight for the fascists and joins the resistance with Elena. After the war, his vitriolic newspaper articles cause him to be sentenced to imprisonment.

recommendations.title: The Sign of Venus
recommendations.overview: Agnese has many men who woo her and live with her cousin Cesira, who has the opposite problem with men and wishes she would also have men woo her.

recommendations.title: In the Name of the Italian People

recommendations.title: Hotel Gagarin
recommendations.overview: An highly heterogeneous group of people go to Armenia to make a movie, all ignoring what will happen to each of them.

recommendations.title: The Widower
